description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its width. The grooves are deep and create a ribbed texture, likely intended to provide traction or drainage. The block is solid and has a dark, mottled coloration, suggesting it is made from a dense stone such as granite or basalt. The sides are smooth and unadorned, with sharp, clean edges that give the block a modern, industrial appearance. The overall form is robust and utilitarian, suitable for use as a barrier or obstacle in urban environments. There are no visible signs of damage, engravings, or significant weathering on the surfaces.
description: A solid, rectangular stone block with deep, parallel grooves on its top surface and a dark, mottled stone appearance. The block is robust and utilitarian, likely used as an urban barrier or obstacle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat face and the full width of the parallel grooves on the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and spacing of the grooves, with the grooves running perpendicular to the viewer.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the flat face and the parallel grooves across the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again emphasizing the deep, evenly spaced grooves running away from the viewer.
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or erosion.
